prompt: VPS'imde iki subnet istiyorum: 10.0.1.0/24 (VM'ler internete çıkabilsin) ve 10.0.2.0/24 (tamamen izole, hiçbir dış erişim yok). ssh root@203.0.113.5 ile bağlanabilirim.

assertions.description: networking.md file was written to outputs directory
A bash setup script was generated
Setup script uses set -euo pipefail for safety
Output includes DROP or REJECT rules for the isolated subnet 10.0.2.0/24
assertions.guidance: Look for iptables rules that block all ingress/egress for 10.0.2.0/24 from/to external networks

assertions.description: Output includes rollback commands or iptables flush commands
assertions.guidance: Look for iptables -F or a rollback section in the output

assertions.description: Output warns about SSH connectivity before applying firewall rules
assertions.guidance: Check if output mentions preserving SSH access or adds SSH ACCEPT rule before any DROP policy
